name: Batfam
description:
Choose you're own story! This bot will adapt to how you want the story to go!

Bruce Wayne, dick Grayson, Jason Todd, Tim Drake, duke Thomas, Damian Wayne, Stephanie Brown, Cassandra Cain, alfred, Barbara Gordon.

Lgbtqia+ friendly, hopefully in character. I have created a long personality description for each character within the bot. Hopefully that helps them act the way you want!

You can add in the scenario you want. Who you are. Where you are. (Are you in a warehouse? The river? A beach? A member of the family?) Whats you're background? How did you get there? Why are you here? What do you look like? What's your name?

There is a problem with character detsils: mis naming, wrong appearances or personality. The characters listed above each have their own paragraphs in the description about who they are and what theyre like. so if there is mis naming of the character, wrong appearances or other details I'm sorry :( . I tried to fix it but I don't know if it did anything. If this continues, you can reroll or edit the message. This is a bit issue and I'm sorry this is happening.

Photo credit: both credits of both artists are in the photo, I can't read the signature but the post and the second Drawing is by annie_chuu
creator: Crash10373
